{"id":"project-LICHEN-s5q2","title":"EDHOC: ed25519_sign casts away const from seed parameter","description":"API MISUSE: ed25519_sign casts away const from seed parameter.

Location: lichen/subsys/lichen/edhoc/edhoc.c:365

crypto_ed25519_key_pair(sk, pk, (uint8_t *)seed);

The seed parameter is declared const uint8_t *, but crypto_ed25519_key_pair takes non-const for the seed.

Monocypher's crypto_ed25519_key_pair likely doesn't modify the seed, but the cast:
1. Violates const-correctness contract
2. Could mask bugs if Monocypher ever modified seed
3. Reduces compiler's ability to catch errors

Fix: Either:
1. Copy seed to local buffer before passing
2. Verify Monocypher API and document the cast
3. Create local non-const copy

{"id":"project-LICHEN-s5q2","title":"EDHOC: ed25519_sign casts away const from seed parameter","description":"API MISUSE: ed25519_sign casts away const from seed parameter.

Location: lichen/subsys/lichen/edhoc/edhoc.c:365

crypto_ed25519_key_pair(sk, pk, (uint8_t *)seed);

The seed parameter is declared const uint8_t *, but crypto_ed25519_key_pair takes non-const for the seed.

Monocypher's crypto_ed25519_key_pair likely doesn't modify the seed, but the cast:
1. Violates const-correctness contract
2. Could mask bugs if Monocypher ever modified seed
3. Reduces compiler's ability to catch errors

Fix: Either:
1. Copy seed to local buffer before passing
2. Verify Monocypher API and document the cast
3. Create local non-const copy
